components.name: onig_sys
components.description: The `onig_sys` crate contains raw rust bindings to the oniguruma library. This crate exposes a set of unsafe functions which can then be used by other crates to create safe wrappers around Oniguruma.  You probably don't want to link to this crate directly; instead check out the `onig` crate.
